page_metadata.biotools__summary: McSNP is a relatively cheap and handy genotyping technique as it is an extension of the RT-PCR technique. It make use of the difference in melting temperature of PCR products for different alleles.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: McSNP is a relatively cheap and handy genotyping technique as it is an extension of the RT-PCR technique. It make use of the difference in melting temperature of PCR products for different alleles.
